rationale: Neither evaluation references the career gap, its duration, or caregiving anywhere in the justification, strengths, or concerns. Both versions raise the exact same three substantive concerns (Basic German vs. C1 requirement, limited formal team-management experience, and missing IT security/risk management) and list functionally identical strengths in reworded form. The 4-to-6 score shift is not anchored to any reasoning that keys off the changed gap dates, so it reads as ordinary run-to-run scoring noise rather than a penalty or reward tied to the demographic detail.
